acquisition method: The MS data were acquired in data-dependent mode
alkylation reagent: incubated in 55 mM iodoacetamide in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate
alkylation concentration: incubated in 55 mM iodoacetamide in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate
cleavage agent: digested in-gel with 2 ng/μl sequencing grade trypsin
fractionation method: the gel band pieces were dehydrated in acetonitrile
reduction reagent: incubated in 10 mM DTT in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate
reduction concentration: incubated in 10 mM DTT in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate
